text: All K-items landed: DMat +/- on kernels; hoisted reads across CSR/CSC/COO/Diagonal/Identity/Permutation/factorization solve loops; CSR.col single-pass; two-pointer zipValues + structure-preserving mapValues; CSC direct column-scatter/gather kernels; CSR.t/CSC.t zero-copy reinterpretation; thin QR (compact reflectors + tau, lazy Q, implicit Q^T least squares); GMRES rewritten with incremental Givens rotations + recurrence residual, preconditioner support for GMRES/BiCGSTAB; ToleranceMode.Absolute/RelativeToRhs; dnrm2 scaled norm2 (red-first overflow/underflow evidence); dgemm row-major fast path + blocked variant (64^3 threshold, untuned heuristic — noted); JMH suite rewritten (@Param sweeps, 2 forks, SpMV + CG-Laplacian scenario benches, fullLinkJS alias, -prof gc documented, smoke run executed). Follow-up landed: factorization solve/hager scratch fully platform-DoubleArray (zero new Array[Double] in Factorizations.scala, grep-verified); sparse conversions build outputs directly in platform arrays (single copy). Evidence: testAll 126/126 JVM+JS, benchCompile green.
